description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to main, pull requests to main, and workflow dispatch. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to run jobs on different operating systems (macos-15, ubuntu-24.04, ubuntu-24.04-arm, windows-2022) with various configurations (release, debug, swift-ios, static, matlab, android). Each job checks out the repository, sets up dependencies, builds and tests the project with specific flags, and uploads test logs, core dumps, crash diagnostics, and crash dumps as artifacts.
